name: Eleven55 Ripley
bathroomsNote: 2BR units come with 2 or 2.5 baths depending on layout (B2A/B2B/B2C/B2ED = 2 bath; B2.5B = 2.5 bath)
approxRentRange: $2,377-$2,727/mo (2BR, as of June 2026; multiple layouts 886-1,285 sq ft)

notes.doorman: UDR amenities page lists '24-hour Concierge services' explicitly. Resident reviews note inconsistent staffing turnover but confirmed a front-desk presence that screens entry.
notes.wellMaintained: Mixed reviews (aggregate ~3.3/5 across 270 reviews, 6.3/10 on VeryApt). Complaints include elevator outages, building leaks in heavy rain, past roach infestation (resolved over ~4 months), and AC failures. Maintenance response praised by some residents. Building is relatively new (high-rise, tallest in Silver Spring at opening) but reviews indicate deferred upkeep on amenities and equipment.
notes.balcony: Resident reviews specifically mention private balconies with DMV views; UDR amenity page does not list balcony as a universal feature (may be unit-specific).
notes.floorPlans: No 1BR+den layout listed on the UDR floor plans page. Only Studio, 1BR, and 2BR offered.
notes.pool: Rooftop pool on the Sky Deck with panoramic Metro DC views; also a 21st-floor Sky Lounge.
notes.petPolicy: Pet-friendly for cats and dogs; specific breed/size restrictions not published on the amenities page.
